summary: Iter27 — JAPAP CONNECT Level 2 (Pro gating + 2% revshare) tested end-to-end. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases PASS (test_iteration27_connect_level2.py). Frontend: ConnectPage refonte verified across 3 plan scenarios via Playwright (free/starter via gating setting swap, free with min_access=none, and business). All data-testid selectors from the request are present and behave correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/connect.py /me: duplicate get_pool()/acquire() blocks (pool and pool2 with conn and conn2) — could reuse a single connection; minor.
routes/connect.py credit_hotspot_owner_from_pro: monthly cap logic correctly clips the amount if cumulative >cap; returns {skipped: monthly_cap} when amount clips to 0. OK.

routes/connect.py /leaderboard: country filter joins on wifi_hotspots.country_code but a user owning hotspots in multiple countries is counted per-country — intended. Note HAVING total_connections>0 means new providers without any connection are hidden from country-scoped view (acceptable).
ConnectPage.js uses axios directly instead of a shared API client — already consistent with app style.
PRO_REQUIRED detail string is stable: 'PRO_REQUIRED:{scope}:{tier}' — frontend parses [,,tier] correctly in connect() and CreateHotspotModal.submit.
BusinessRevshareCard: hardcodes dollar values in labels ('2%') but pulls rs.pct dynamically — consistent. OK.
test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!, bob@japap.com / Test1234! (seeded), alice@japap.com / Test1234! (seeded)
seed_data_creation: Seeded bob@japap.com (user_bob_test0001) and alice@japap.com (user_alice_test001) directly via psql with bcrypt hash for password Test1234!, since previous iteration users had been wiped. Also pytest fixture cleans wifi_hotspots, wifi_connections and referral_rewards_log role='connect_revshare' before/after. Admin-grant/revoke cycles Pro plans on bob/alice to test gating — restored to defaults after suite (connect_min_pro_to_access=starter, connect_min_pro_to_share=business).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test users bob@japap.com and alice@japap.com now exist persistently (seeded via direct SQL). test_iteration27_connect_level2.py is self-healing (autouse fixture restores baseline settings and revokes residual Pro subs). To reproduce all 3 frontend scenarios: set connect_min_pro_to_access='none' via admin/settings to turn gating-use OFF for free users (gating-share then visible for <business users); grant business via /api/admin/pro/grant {user_id,plan_id:'business',days:30} to enable revshare-card + tab-earnings. Keep PLAN_PRICE map (starter=5, creator=10, business=30) in ConnectPage.js if pricing changes on backend.
rca of the issue: N/A — all backend endpoints and frontend UI states behaved per spec. Only glitch during first pytest run was asyncpg DSN missing when calling credit_hotspot_owner_from_pro() directly (import path had no DATABASE_URL); fixed by loading /app/backend/.env inside the test before the direct call.
